name: TurningLock to Right
following_figure_names: Wing, Chasse From Promenade Position, Left Whisk, Weave From Promenade Position, Cross Hesitation
notes:
Lady will not brush on preceding Natural Spin Turn, but brush towards when moving into step 4 of Turning Lock to R.
Lady's head weight to left which helps the turn. Only turn to R going into count 3.
Keep big step. There are continuously big steps, if one step is shorter, it stops momentum. Body dance smoothly and continuously.
Lady R side/arm to Man. Check R elbow at correct angle. R side can never be "dead".

steps.action: LF crosses loosely in front of RF
RF to side and slightly forward, small step between partner's feet
LF diagonal forward, left side leading in PP

comments: Lady will not brush on preceding Natural Spin Turn, but brush towards when moving into step 4 of Turning Lock to R.
Lady's head weight to left which helps the turn. Only turn to R going into count 3.

steps.action: LF to side and slightly back
comments: Bigger step, so Lady can stay behind Man. Stretch. After weight is on LF, articulate head to PP.

steps.action: RF to side in PP, having brushed towards LF
comments: Keep big step. There are continuously big steps, if one step is shorter, it stops momentum. Body dance smoothly and continuously.
Lady R side/arm to Man. Check R elbow at correct angle. R side can never be "dead".
